account_scope: same retained Spotify Web Player account
method: Compare normal Web Player state with direct partner, Connect, and Dealer protocol replay, then verify the resulting device state.

recently_played.browser_result: The Web Player Recents page showed the same recent entities, dates, and activity labels.
recently_played.direct_result: spotify.recently_played returned the matching first five Recents entities without the public Web API.
recently_played.semantic_limit: The website route exposes Recents activity, not exact played_at timestamps.

devices.browser_result: The device picker showed the same browser and MacBook devices.
devices.direct_result: spotify.devices returned those devices from connect-state/v1/cluster.

play.direct_result: spotify.play changed the active context to the requested playlist and reported verified=true.
play.browser_result: The Web Player rendered the requested playlist context as now playing.

pause.browser_result: The Web Player and subsequent connect-state read both showed playback paused.

shuffle.direct_result: The direct Dealer controller changed shuffle and restored it, with both calls verified.
shuffle.browser_result: The rendered Web Player control confirmed shuffle was restored off.

repeat.direct_result: The direct Dealer controller enabled context repeat and restored repeat off.
repeat.browser_result: The rendered Web Player control confirmed repeat was restored off.

add_to_queue_and_next.direct_result: The direct Dealer controller queued the requested track, advanced playback, and verified both resulting state revisions.
add_to_queue_and_next.browser_result: The Web Player independently rendered the queued and advanced track state.

account.browser_result: The authenticated Web Player rendered Anay Garodia and the Premium account collection.
account.direct_result: spotify.account returned the same display name, account id, country, and PREMIUM product from the retained Web Player session.

playlists.regression_fixed: Liked Songs is a synthetic collection row and no longer consumes one requested playlist result.

negative_finding: HTTP 200 alone is not accepted as mutation evidence; controller commands must be followed by observed state revision checks.
